rationale: Review 1 correctly identifies at least two material reuse issues verifiable in the diff: the `includeRight_apply` lemma is a trivial `rfl` duplicate of Mathlib's own `Algebra.TensorProduct.includeRight_apply`, and genuinely general helpers (`BialgHom.map_antipode`, `map_id`, `map_comp`) are locked behind `private`, preventing reuse across Tau Ceti. Acting on Review 1 removes unnecessary duplication and exposes reusable results; acting on Review 2 (which finds nothing) leaves both issues unfixed.
